properties.name: app.jwt.jwks-uri
properties.description: JWKS endpoint used by the gateway to validate JWT signatures.

properties.name: app.jwt.jwks-cache-seconds
properties.description: TTL for cached JWKS responses in seconds.

properties.name: app.security.token-blacklist.l1.max-size
properties.description: Maximum size of the in-memory token blacklist cache.

properties.name: app.security.token-blacklist.l1.ttl-seconds
properties.description: TTL for the in-memory token blacklist cache in seconds.
